name: sdlc-forge-lite
description: Free taste of SDLC Forge: an AI-guided software delivery framework for Claude Code. Ships the Forge Guide orchestrator (phase detection + next-action routing across a 9-phase SDLC), a phase-detection skill, and the morning-standup compound workflow. Upgrade to Premium for the full 100+ command set, ForgeSync (two-way sync with GitHub Issues / Azure DevOps / Jira), and 63 project templates.
